_readme: Wiki vs Tooling zone classification per Phase 2 Rule 1. Source of truth: wiki/system/build-plans/phase-2-framing.md. Read by hooks/guards/naming-zone.ts (standalone Write) and pretooluse-router.ts (Bash mv / obsidian move). Boundary test from Rule 1: 'Will a human read this primarily by clicking a wikilink in Obsidian?' Yes routes to Wiki zone, no routes to Tooling zone.

classification_rules._readme: Path-prefix and path-pattern rules to determine a destination's zone. Evaluated in order; first match wins. Patterns are JS regex strings, anchored to the full absolute path.

rules._match: Tooling-zone subfolders under wiki/system/ (build-plans, projects, adrs)
Wiki-zone topic hubs at wiki/system/ root
Wiki-zone six domains and root files

zone_filename_patterns._readme: Filename validation per zone. Wiki: Title Case + spaces, acronyms preserved. Tooling: lowercase-hyphen, with ADR-NNN- and phase-N- prefixes preserved as written, plus YYYY-MM-DD- dated artifact prefix.

wiki._readme: Filename starts with uppercase letter, contains letters, digits, spaces, hyphens. Acronyms (CF, EOS, CRM, ADR, MOC, etc.) are all-caps and naturally fit this pattern.

tooling._readme: Lowercase-hyphen base pattern, OR acronym-prefixed (ADR-NNN-name, phase-N-name), OR YYYY-MM-DD-name dated artifact.

exempt_files._readme: Files exempt from naming-zone validation. Knowledge/References/SurrealDB/ uses technical lowercase-hyphen naming (Phase 2 open question; deferred to Cleanup Candidates).

scope._readme: Path scope. Only file creations or moves whose destination matches one of these prefixes are validated.
